revision.comment: Adding local [[Wikipedia:Short description|short description]]: "Wikimedia project page", overriding Wikidata description "Wikimedia project page"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Template_index%2FSplitting%2FList here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Template_index%2FSplitting%2FList for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Short description|Wikimedia project page}}
<noinclude>;This page is utilized as a sub-template :which is called and is common to the usage sections of the merge templates it lists. 
:It does nothing more than list these links and self-categorize itself.</noinclude>{{#if:{{{noheading|}}}||
==See also==
{{further2|[[Wikipedia:Splitting]]|[[Wikipedia:Merging]]|[[Wikipedia:Section move]]}}
}}
=== Splitting ===
{{div col|colwidth=25em}}
* {{tl|Split}}
* {{tl|Split dab}}
* {{tl|Split section}}
* {{tl|Split sections}}
* {{tl|Split portions}}
* {{tl|Split section portions}}
* {{tl|Section move from}}
* {{tl|Very long}}
{{div col end}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Documentation see also templates|Splitting]]
[[Category:Wikipedia template administration]]
</noinclude>
